## ListViewParams.items property

Specifies the items within the listview, either as a single dimension array for a single row or a multi-dimensional array for multiple columns per row. Can also include seperator objects to divide the list into multiple sections.

**Signature:**

```typescript
items: Bindable<ListViewItem[] | string[]>;
```
